items.prompt: Using the source material, respond: # **Slide 2: The 70% Clinician Burnout Figure**

Using the source material, respond: "70% of frontline clinicians report at least one symptom of professional burnout. Say it plainly: 70%. This 70% figure is the single headline statistic of the entire lesson."
